requirements.text: Investigate and fix the loading timeout issue in the application. Check LoadingTimeout component usage, loading states in useQueries hooks, and network request handling to ensure proper error handling and loading state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Loading states resolve properly without timeouts
Error states are properly handled and displayed to users
No infinite loading spinners occur during normal operation
Backend queries return responses within reasonable time

requirements.text: Review and optimize backend actor initialization and authentication flow to prevent hanging requests during Internet Identity authentication or actor creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Authentication flow does not cause hanging requests
Proper error handling for failed actor creation

requirements.text: Verify that all React Query hooks properly handle loading, error, and success states without causing indefinite loading conditions in ProductBrowse and AdminProducts pages.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductBrowse page loads products without timeout
AdminProducts page loads admin data without timeout
Loading states transition properly to success or error states
LoadingTimeout component triggers retry mechanism when appropriate
